title: POWI Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
text: Power Integrations Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript held on May 7, 2026. CEO Jennifer Lloyd and CFO Nancy Erba reported Q1 revenue of $108.3 million, up 3% YoY and 5% sequentially. Non-GAAP EPS reached $0.25 per diluted share. Non-GAAP gross margin improved to 53.5%, up 20 basis points sequentially. Non-GAAP operating margin reached 11.7%, up 200 basis points from prior quarter. Industrial segment revenue grew 23% year-over-year with 15% sequential increase. Consumer revenue declined year-over-year due to prior-year tariff pull-ins but rose 17% sequentially as inventory normalized. Communications and Computer segments experienced seasonal declines. The company announced Mike Balow as SVP of Worldwide Sales. Launched TinySwitch-5 and TopSwitch GaN products. In automotive, POWI is in production or design engagements with 17 of the top 20 EV manufacturers, targeting $100 million automotive revenue by 2029. Management estimates data center SAM, including rack and grid applications, will exceed $1 billion by 2030. Q2 guidance provided for revenues of $115-120 million with non-GAAP gross margin of 54-55% and operating margin of 13.5-15.5%.
